justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering options, which made the conversation longer than necessary.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made a slightly redundant API call by checking for June 9th at all, even though the user had already specified a time on June 9th.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt a bit tiring due to the agent's repeated unavailability responses and lack of proactive suggestions.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by asking for other dates or contact mediums, but it did not proactively suggest alternative times or dates within the same medium, which led to a longer conversation.
